entities.description: As a subsection of '3电气特性', this section details the electrical characteristics of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, including voltage levels, current ratings, and other relevant electrical specifications.
Refers to the electrical properties and performance metrics of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, which are described in section 3.

relations.description: The concept of '电气特性' is the primary topic of section 3.
